free_text: Excitation functions of long lived products in
deuteron induced nuclear reactions on platinum up to
40 MeV
Cyclotron and Radioisotope Center
Information on data analysis and decay data of 197Pt
Beam intensity is 100 to 130 nA.
- Target is natural.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness: 10 micro-meter
Irradiated for 0.5 hour
Stacked with Al and Cu monitor foils
Without chemical separation
AVF Cyclotron at Cyclotron and
Radioisotope Center
For isotopes resulting in gamma lines with
closed energies
To measure gamma spectra
No information on source of uncertainties
ALICE-IPPE code
Fig.14-17, p24-25 in reference
Tk + On.
